plugins.name: REVA Teaching & Learning Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Educator Plugin: Coordinates syllabus design, session planning, content generation, and course integrity audits.

plugins.name: REVA Research & Scholarship Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Scholar Plugin: Drives capstone projects, academic manuscript writing, grant proposals, and publication tracking.

plugins.name: REVA Academic Administration Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Administrator Plugin: Powers orchestrations, curriculum revisions, syllabus publications, attainment evaluations, and regulatory compliance audits.

plugins.name: REVA Consulting & Product Development Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Consultant/Innovator Plugin: Manages experiential learning, industry connect MOUs, consulting engagement briefs, and patent IP claim drafts.

plugins.name: REVA Kaizen & Wellbeing Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Self-Improver Plugin: Powering self-reflection coaching, habit and commitment trackers, FDP integrations, GPS planning, and wellbeing navigations.

plugins.name: REVA Law Student Study Companion
plugins.description: Socratic drilling, case briefing, IRAC grading, AIBE prep (first-class), moot court simulation, and exam forecasting for REVA Law School students (BA LLB, BBA LLB, LLM, PhD). Learning mode only — never writes the answer for you. Standalone plugin — install independently without other REVA plugins.
